description: The Local Screen Point To World node takes in a normalized screen space (``0`` to ``1`` along the user's screen in the X and Y position), and converts it to a position in world space. This node just takes where you are looking plus the distance from the local user and makes a value someplace outward from your camera/screen.

fields.NormalizedScreenPoint: The screen point from the user's perspective.
fields.Distance: The distance from this local user's view point.
fields.* ([[Type:float3|float3]]): Returns the position from the local user's point of view into a position value in world space.
